description:
Hard-coded hex offsets appear throughout without semantic names:

Rust:
- crates/integral-cli/src/main.rs lines 380-388: data.get(0x06), data.get(0x25), etc.
- crates/integral-core/src/device.rs: THROTTLE_MS=40.0, ECHO_SUPPRESS_MS=150.0 (no source attribution)
- crates/integral-core/src/sn_drum.rs: SND_FIRST_KEY=27, SND_LAST_KEY=88

Web:
- Multiple components use 0x43, 0x44, 0x08, 0x09 without explanation

Fix: Define named constants (e.g., PART_RECEIVE_CHANNEL_OFFSET = 0x00,
PART_MUTE_OFFSET = 0x25) in a shared constants module. Reference Roland
MIDI Implementation doc section in comments.
title: Replace magic numbers with named constants in CLI and web
